description:
Offered: every fourth semester
Theories about literature are examined, and their practical application in the classroom and in one’s own reading is discussed. Approaches to different forms of literature as well as a survey of changing historical perspectives are also explored.
Prerequisite(s): ENGL 1200 and satisfactory completion of one 3 credit literature course at the 2000 or 3000 level, or permission of instructor.
prerequisites: ENGL 1200 and satisfactory completion of one 3 credit literature course at the 2000 or 3000 level, or permission of instructor.
